reviews.review_title: Would be cool if I could play
reviews.review_description:
Can't get past the part in the tutorial when you have to kill caroonish skeletons with your newly-acquired lightning spell. They just keep on coming, forever and ever, without a prompt for what to do next. 

At least there's an in-game option to quit. Some paid games don't even have that.

developer_response.body: the key to getting past each part of the tutorial is in the poem that's displayed and read to the player.  in any case, thanks for giving the game a shot!

reviews.review_description:
Generic is something i can forgive for a free game... Buggy is not. I couldn't use the workshop to craft a staff because two of the three stations bugged out and broke. 

the rest of the game is not interesting enough to make up for it. Not worth your time imo.

developer_response.body: it's been a minute since i've done some ux iteration on that crafting workshop.  i suppose i should revisit that sometime soon.  it's doable, it's just not clear what exactly to do, lol.

reviews.review_description: Throwing spells around at enemies is super fun. You can also craft a staff and 3D print it!
